steps.title: Find the key signal in the notes
steps.content: The notes state exactly who the award is named for: “It is named after groundbreaking British mathematician Alan Turing.” This is the information the student needs to include in the response.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: Choice B directly incorporates this information, stating “The A.M. Turing Award is named for groundbreaking British mathematician Alan Turing.” The other three choices address the award's purpose (A), when it was won (C), or a recipient's accomplishments (D) — none explaining whom it's named after. That matches choice B — B is correct.
